hooks.command: cmd=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE '(del |rm |erase |remove-item).*MVP'; then printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"! MVP（置顶）.md is protected and cannot be deleted via command line"}'; fi

input=$(cat); msg=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.message // ""'); if echo "$msg" | grep -qE 'MVP|提炼|帮我读这篇|文章.*转化|→MVP|->MVP'; then jq -cn '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"[STANDING ORDER ACTIVE] Article-to-MVP mode activated. Structure your ENTIRE response using exactly these 4 sections (as defined in ! MVP（置顶）.md at vault root): 1.核心观点(≤3句,去掉所有修辞后最硬的洞见) 2.MVP方案(伦敦在地化,必须满足四标准:⏱1-2周内可启动/💷低成本或零成本/🧪有明确成功或失败判据/🔗与IRP或伦敦资源有交叉点) 3.今天的第一步(今天下班前能完成的1件具体行动,不是计划) 4.复利评估(这个MVP跑通后会打开哪些更大的门)"}}'; fi
